description: A draft of a pre-nuptial agreement between husband and wife, contains most of the known stipulations found in marriage documents during the 12th century such as the monogamy clause, the wife permission to work, domicile stipulation, husband behavior. Early: 10, Late payment or dowry: 50, no dowry list preserved. On the bottom of the page pen trials. On recto a poem. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
